programmes.show_description: Crossbow And A Cross To Bear. Desperate for food, Gwen and Sarah lead the charge to build a crossbow in the bush while Ryan feels the pressure. And, a fire pushes Bulent to the edge. S5, Ep10
Strength In Pain. An adventuress teams up with a wilderness instructor to take on the tropical rainforests of Honduras. But will they survive a close encounter with a deadly snake? S2, Ep28
Teleshopping.

Teleshopping.
Trenton Central High School. The team take on a huge high school in Trenton, New Jersey. Key items include fireclay sinks and oak cabinets. Plus, Mike and Tay build an N-shaped desk. S5, Ep5
Portside Marina. The guys save the bow and stern of a boat on Smith Mountain Lake in Moneta, Virginia. And, new team members Molly May and Stella make their debut. S5, Ep6
Hail Mary. Desperate to find new gold, Shawn pushes himself and his equipment to the limit. At Sledge Island, the deeper water triggers dangerous side effects for Zeke. S6, Ep3
Proving Day. Shawn's obsession with the bluff hits breaking point. Zeke and Emily take a last trip to Sledge Island, and novice George Young seeks riches on the Bering Sea floor. S6, Ep4
Scrappers boss Alex Stead gambles his remaining cash on bigger machinery, pushing his marriage to the edge. And, the Victoria Diggers unearth a rare artefact. S4, Ep11
The Great Auk. Forrest is in the Faroe Islands looking for a trace of the great auk, a large flightless seabird that was declared extinct over 175 years ago. S1, Ep5
Frontier Medicine. Ice and injuries have the captains considering desperate measures as the fleet battles for survival in the face of an epic arctic hurricane. S7, Ep10
Birds, Bones And Blood. As winter storms rip through the crab grounds, the Ramblin' Rose takes a big risk and the Time Bandit courts danger at the dock. S7, Ep11
Weathering the Storm. Deep in the mountains of British Columbia, there's a legend - a fortune in gold guarded by a dangerous curse. Now, six adventurers return to go for gold. S1, Ep4
Journey To The Ice Age. Josh treks deep into Siberia for a site where priceless mammoth bones are mined out of the permafrost. Then, he takes the DNA samples back to the lab. S3, Ep6
Cracking The D.B. Cooper Case. Josh Gates sets off on an expedition to crack the mystery behind the perpetrator of the only unsolved plane hijacking in US history. S3, Ep7
Arizona Washout. A daughter pleads for help from the Raneys to rescue her mother and step-father whose failing homestead is threatened by deadly monsoon floods and a menacing cougar. S3, Ep11
Smoky Mountain Fury. In the Smoky Mountains, the Raneys visit a wind-ravaged homestead on the brink of total collapse. They race to shore up key structures before the next big storm. S3, Ep12
Succession Of Opal Joe. The Blacklighters discover opalised sea creatures in an ancient seabed. The Cheals close in on their biggest opal haul ever, but all is not as it seems. S6, Ep8
A Glimmer Of Hope. The Mooka Boys attempt to reach a new mine on a treacherous opal field. Plus, the Blacklighters are almost buried alive mining opal in unstable tunnels. S6, Ep9
40-Foot Monsters. As fall season ends, its biggest storm hits. Wild Bill fights to pilot his new boat in big seas and Johnathan tackles a huge swell in the perilous False Pass. S13, Ep8
The Russian Line. Competition doubles when the quota is halved. Three captains arrive early for the winter season, but Johnathan plots a dangerous, 600-mile course to Russia. S13, Ep9
Jack Knows Best. When the Black Pearl's trommel motor catches fire, Todd's crew attempts to modify the smaller wash plant Jack built decades ago to run more pay dirt. S2, Ep10
Under The Gun. Sig devises a way to speed up his crew. Wild Bill promotes Landon to the wheelhouse while he goes under the knife. Keith helps Jack but is suspicious. S20, Ep10
Jacqui and Andrew are targeted by potential gold thieves. Marcus and Linden hunt ground close to the site of the biggest nugget ever found in Western Australia. S7, Ep12
Banished But Not Broken. With extraction just days away, a survivalist tries to complete the challenge alone. Gwen and Sarah push for one last kill and a snake bite could be lethal. S5, Ep11

Teleshopping.
Return To Trenton High School. The Dawgs return to Trenton Central High School, finding clock faces and library ladders. And, Mike and Tay build a table from an old jail bed. S5, Ep7
Reed Creek Mill. The Dawgs salvage the Reed Creek Mill in Wytheville, Virginia. Key items found include conveyor belts and a flour hopper. Mike also builds a console for his nephew. S5, Ep8
Fickle Fortune. Halfway through the season, Shawn needs massive gold at the Bluff or his empire faces ruin. After the debacle at Sledge Island, Zeke and Emily reach breaking point. S6, Ep5
Reaper Madness. Keen to reverse his fortunes, Zeke starts a perilous solo dive. The Kellys risk a 13-mile trip in their rinky-dink dredge and George wants to prove his mining mettle. S6, Ep6
The Dirt Dogs' huge dry blower shuts down due to extreme temperatures, while the Mahoneys and Gold Gypsies take a last-minute gamble that delivers big gold. S4, Ep12
The Pachylemur. Madagascar's Pachylemurs were red, furry giants, nearly the size of great apes. Forrest scales the jungle canopy to prove the giant species still lives. S1, Ep6
It's Not All Mai Tais And Yahtzee. A crewman on the Seabrooke narrowly avoids serious injury. Meanwhile a loose pot turns into a half-ton wrecking ball on the Kodiak. S7, Ep12
Pirate School. The captain and deckhand clash on the Cornelia Marie over a crippling lack of bait, and the Time Bandit's soft-spoken greenhorn goes to 'Pirate School'. S7, Ep13
Secrets Revealed. Daryl's got new info about gold on the Terrarosa Glacier, but he'll only reveal it if he can tag along with Adam and Evan. Plus, Fred gets a mysterious call. S1, Ep5
Lasseter's Gold. Josh Gates sets off deep into the Australian Outback. He follows the footsteps of legendary explorer Harold Lasseter, who claims to have found a vast field of gold. S3, Ep8
Tracking Tasmania's Tiger. Josh ventures to Australia's island state of Tasmania. He investigates sightings of the supposedly extinct Thylacine, also known as the Tasmanian Tiger. S3, Ep9
Volcano's Edge. The Raneys put their ingenuity to the test on a homestead in Hawaii that was destroyed by a massive lava flow. First, they must bring life back to the property. S3, Ep13
The Bears And The Bees. The Raneys arrives at a homestead with a bee-obsessed owner unintentionally attracting bears with his hives. Plus, dangerous winds threaten the bathhouse. S1, Ep14
The Reward Of The Effort. The Opal Whisperers' partnership with veteran miner Uwe ends abruptly. The Misfits finally hit old timers' workings at the bottom of their open cut mine. S6, Ep10
Soldier Of Fortune. The broke Bushmen are forced to trade opal to get a shaft drilled on a new claim. The Digi Diggers get lost exploring a terrifying abandoned mine. S6, Ep11
Back To The Killing Season. Sig returns to the season that nearly killed him. After a tough start, Keith and son fight to prove themselves. Plus, Wild Bill gives Nick another chance. S13, Ep10
Hurricane Alley. When the Arctic unleashes its winter wrath, the first of several hurricanes descend on the fleet. Patchy fishing and mutiny converge to create the perfect storm. S13, Ep11
Rebuilding Cabin After Storm. Chase and the team battle freezing temperatures taking on a heartfelt rebuild for a family after a devastating storm destroys their beloved camp. S15, Ep6
Secrets From The Boneyard. Working at the Boneyard the guys turn a Kentucky two-story log cabin into a double pen dogtrot and repair a timber frame barn from Pennsylvania. S15, Ep6
The Poseidon Crew finally start digging legendary ground in search of a multi-million-dollar nugget. Shane and Russell endure the snake-ridden wilderness in Pilbara. S7, Ep13
